---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- What user-visible problem does this solve? Whose problem is it? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- A concrete description of what you want Liquid to do. The more specific
     the better — "let me wire arbitrary slots" is harder to act on than
     "add a `liquid bindings wire <src> <dst>` CLI command". -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about. Worth listing even if you've ruled
     them out — it saves the maintainers from re-deriving them. -->

## Where does this fit?

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Phase / Milestone | <!-- e.g. Phase 1 / M5 (FFI bridge) — see IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md --> |
| Affected layer | Rust core / Flutter shell / SDK / CLI / docs |
| Public API surface? | yes / no |
| Breaking change? | yes / no |

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, links, prior art from other projects, or anything else that
     helps the maintainers evaluate the request. -->

## Self-checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I read the relevant section of [`IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md`](../../IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md) and this is not already on the roadmap.
- [ ] If this requires a new design decision, I am willing to help write the ADR (see [`docs/adr/TEMPLATE.md`](../../docs/adr/TEMPLATE.md)).
